title: rubus infoecundus
intro: Rubus infoecundus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to the Himalayas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus infoecundus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and it is also used in traditional cooking and as a flavoring agent.
